run_notes: Mode 2 cleanup run. Previous run (2026-04-08T06-30) patches for ISS-444/462/463 awaiting human application. This run: HOL-MISSING new issues created (ISS-466-475), Cycle 2 WIN-001 issues (ISS-476-478), EXP-012 assigned to analyst. 3 new patches written (WIN-001 selective damping, 1.57c clarification, dome circular-reasoning citation).

pipeline_status.poller: QUIET — no substantive dome site changes. All 10 recent commits are automated (monitor.py + pull_data.py). Eclipse prediction (Aug 12, 2026, -17 to -21 nT) still active. Canary traps: no triggers.
pipeline_status.analyst: EXP-003 (Section 4.5.9 d_geo rewrite) revised per NOTE-001. EXP-004 (Section 4.8 Solar angular diameter) complete. Both ready for integration but sections.json does not exist yet — integration blocked on prose extraction refactor.
pipeline_status.curmudgeon: PHASE TRANSITION: Cycle 1 Phase 1 (67 WINs + 32 sections/kill-shots) and Phase 2 (9 holistic checks) COMPLETE. Cycle 2 begun — WIN-001 reviewed (verdict holds, 0.92 confidence, 3 minor issues). Phase 2 holistic HOL-MISSING produced 10 new cross-cutting arguments (5 major, 4 moderate, 1 minor) now tracked as ISS-466-475 and assigned to EXP-012.

pipeline_status.external_reports: No external reports filed (no report JSONs in monitor/external-reports/ beyond README).

pipeline_health.summary: Pipeline healthy. gh CLI not authenticated — external GitHub issues cannot be checked or commented on automatically. This is a recurring issue flagged in previous runs. No new infrastructure problems detected.
